Petition For Order On Marital Status At The Time Of Death.
Off Calendar May-06-2014 Off Calendar

Petition For Order On Marital Status At The Time Of Death.
Off Calendar Apr-15-2014 Continued To May-06-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-15-2014 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Mar-04-2014 Continued To Apr-15-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James Ward for and with Cora Pangan. Clifton Lurkis for and with Felicia Pangan.

Mr. Ward informed the Court that there is a will, a trust and an amendment. Counsel stated that they are working cooperatively and discussing settlement. The Court stated that it is not appropriate to advance the hearing on the Petition for Order on Marital Status at the Time of Death until the family law matter is determined. The ex parte petition to advance hearing date is off calendar. The Petition for Letters of Administration was continued to April 15, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)
